mechanics.notes: The description explicitly states 'By 3rd level', but the 'level' field is set to 1. This is a common discrepancy when features are granted at level X but listed under the initial class level/entry. For mechanical accuracy against the RAW data provided, the level listed (1) contradicts the description (3rd level).
